headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, while the Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought 6-4 win over the Cleveland Guardians. The Atlanta Braves shut out the Philadelphia Phillies 9-0, and the San Francisco Giants took down the Washington Nationals 10-5.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams, with the Seattle Mariners placing Patrick Wisdom on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain. The Detroit Tigers have also placed Zach McKinstry on the 10-day injured list with left hip/abdominal inflammation. The Houston Astros transferred Josh Hader to the 60-day injured list with left biceps tendinitis, while the Chicago Cubs placed Daniel Palencia on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place, including the Baltimore Orioles acquiring right-handed pitcher Axel Perez from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott. The Washington Nationals acquired left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady from the New York Mets for cash, while the Milwaukee Brewers acquired right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Mets 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a lopsided 12-4 victory, securing a decisive win. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians in Thrilling 6-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought win against the Cleveland Guardians, with a final score of 6-4. Daniel Schneemann led the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Braves Shut Out Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Heliot Ramos leading the charge at the plate. Ramos hit a home run and drove in four runs, while Logan Webb earned the win on the mound.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Patrick Wisdom on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners first baseman Patrick Wisdom has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Axel Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have bolstered their roster with the addition of right-handed pitcher Axel Perez, who was acquired in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Perez joins the Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.
